issues.description: Action type 'FlipLife' is incorrect. The effect adds a Character card to Life cards, not flips Life. Should use 'AttachDon' or similar mechanic to represent adding a card to Life cards. However, 'AttachDon' typically adds Don cards. This effect requires a custom or clarified action type that represents 'add Character to Life cards' — no standard action perfectly maps this.
Missing condition: effect only targets '{Land of Wano} type Characters other than [Kouzuki Momonosuke]'. Current DSL has no conditions filtering by card type or exclusion.
Missing target specification: effect should target a Character in hand or on board to add to Life cards. Current DSL provides no target context.
Blocker keyword not represented in DSL. The card text begins with '[Blocker]' which should be encoded as a keyword or separate effect, not omitted.
